markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.230 — Optional Procedure

This subchapter provides an optional procedure for the issuance of a permit by the Victoria County Navigation District for the movement of oversize or overweight vehicles carrying cargo in Victoria County.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 613 (S.B.524), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: This subchapter provides an optional procedure for the issuance of a permit by the Victoria County Navigation District for the movement of oversize or overweight vehicles carrying cargo in Victoria County.
